text:
EXPLANATION: The paper is confirmed real and published in NeurIPS 2017. The cited author "Kristof Schütt" omits the middle initial "T." (full name: Kristof T. Schütt), which is a minor author-name formatting difference — the remaining authors and title match exactly.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.08566
FOUND_TITLE: SchNet: A continuous-filter convolutional neural network for modeling quantum interactions
FOUND_AUTHORS: Kristof T. Schütt, Pieter-Jan Kindermans, Huziel Enoc Sauceda Felix, Stefan Chmiela, Alexandre Tkatchenko, Klaus-Robert Müller
FOUND_YEAR: 2017
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
